name: wolastoq-bingo
description: Saint Mary's Entertainment Centre - Bingo Ticket Booking System

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run audit:prod
scripts.audit:prod: cd client && npm audit --omit=dev && cd ../server && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.test:api: node scripts/seat-lock-api-check.mjs && node scripts/admin-seat-move-api-check.mjs && node scripts/booking-initiate-failure-api-check.mjs && node scripts/booking-initiate-duplicate-api-check.mjs && node scripts/paper-card-limits-api-check.mjs && node scripts/phd-credit-api-check.mjs && node scripts/special-bingo-service-fee-api-check.mjs && node scripts/live-event-packages-api-check.mjs && node scripts/recurring-schedule-toggle-check.mjs && node scripts/authorize-net-webhook-ack-check.mjs && node scripts/bulk-ticket-session-types-api-check.mjs && node scripts/customer-report-api-check.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:receipts && npm run smoke && npm run test:holds && npm run test:api
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run migrate && npm run seed
